title: Naturalized Animals
description: Resource Pack that modernizes animal models to make them more similar to Minecraft's contemporary style!
body:
![Naturalized Animals Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63f5f9ccfa9804d1e36c8b3353899d50cd9ba6ab.png)

A resource pack that aims to modernize already existing Minecraft animals, and make them so they resemble in a better way the game's new art style.
To do so, I also took a lot of inspiration from the **Naturalist Mod** from _Starfish Studios_!

Also, some animals have been slightly retextured so they look more similar to their real life counter part.
![Featured Land Animals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a92487e3c3eb2551c30680ecc549206861ead15.png)

### Featured Animals
  - Cow - Pig - Sheep - Chicken - Polar Bear - Bat - Parrot - Rabbit - Frog - Cod - Salmon - Pufferfish - Squid - Strider - Hoglin - Goat - Wolf - Cat - Dolphin - Turtle

![Featured Water Animals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c6ccf6e7ee56242605d0fe71704a9f2b1f2a4f9.png)

> **This resource pack requires ETF and EMF to work properly!
> Optifine also works!**

## Note
This resource pack have models heavily inspired by **@Vitreous_Glassy**'s concepts on Twitter, _all of this is made with their consent._ 

For more updates follow me on _Twitter_: **@Blascard02**
